text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, good morning, you two! You're both up
early. That's the rising stars of Ritto Dorm for you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Good morning.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Mornin'.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Well, I suppose I can hardly blame either of
you for being on edge.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The spring Classics season is just about to wrap
up. Do make sure to give it your all, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Of course.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad to hear it! Now then, everyone around
the table. We have a wonderful breakfast waiting
for―

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I need to go train.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Dear me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet starts training for the day.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The sky is clear, and I feel great! Wow, what a
wonderful day to train!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm going to go for another lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't help but think she's hiding something...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hmm... She's still not back to normal, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, excuse me. I hope I didn't startle you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I simply wanted to hear your thoughts on the two
of them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet and Vodka. Surely you're not blind to the
tension between them. This morning, it seemed
worse than ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As their dorm leader and someone with a bit more
experience, I want to lend what help I can.
choice_data_list: Thanks for looking out for them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. If there's anything I can do to help, just
say the word.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They have the potential to become legendary
rivals. To occupy irreplaceable positions in each
other's lives.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
To push one another to strive for better. To refine
their running that little bit further. But it will take
both of them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume's running reflects the innermost
workings of her heart. And it's far too soon to let
their light fade.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki watches Daiwa Scarlet train for a little
while longer before she leaves.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Was that Fuji with you just now? Did she
need something?
choice_data_list: I hear you're fighting with Vodka again.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What does that matter?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We've been fighting on and off since we started
sharing a room.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not like today was special or anything. Just
business as usual.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's right. It's not important. She can do
or say whatever she likes, but it's got nothing to
do with me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm nothing like her. I'm going to win the Tiara
tour and become number one...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph! That's got nothing to do with you either!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now hurry up and get ready to record my time!
I'm planning to break my record today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her grandiosity, Scarlet's form is more
rigid than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume's running reflects the innermost
workings of her heart. No truer words have ever
been spoken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Should we continue the Tiara tour with the
Japanese Oaks... or should we choose another
path?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, it's my responsibility to choose
what's best for her. And that is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's best to focus on the path she has chosen for
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to prepare for the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants to grow, she needs a chance to come
to terms with her own feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to prepare for the Japanese Derby.
